blended.narrative: Monarch Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Strong winds with gusts to 51 mph may cause lift holds.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: flurries, highs of 40°F, gusts to 51 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 24".
